title: Magic Trio Peelers Set of 3 Potato Fruits Peeler Cabbage Stainless Steel Shredder Slicer with Plastic Orange Peeler (1Pcs/Set)
features: ➤Three types of blade for different purposes: 1. General peeling of fruits/vegetables; 2. Cabbage shredder, cheese slicer, thin slicing; 3. Julienne of carrots, cucumber, potato, etc
➤Orange peeler: 1 PCS Orange peeler thick material, not easy to break, sharp edge. It can easily peel off the orange, lemons and small grapefruits, avoiding the juice covered with hands.

➤“U” Shape Design: The magic peeler trio set was designed with “U” shaped handle which allows a comfortable grip suitable for left and right handed people, it is smoother to hold even repetitive action peeling. The handle also can be used to remove seeds of fruits and vegetables.

➤New Vegetables Fruits Peeler: Great Home vegetable peeler features dual ultra sharp surgical stainless steel swivel double-edge blade. The peeler can handle bumps and curves with ease and without clogging or losing its edge.
➤Peeler knife for kitchen： Vegetable peeler has a mirror polished smooth that is easy to clean. for rust-free, durable, dishwasher safe and easy to store.
description: A great magic trio Peeler tool for any kitchen or bar! -------------------------------------------------------- More Features 1. Use the standard peeler for peeling any fruit or vegetable, and slicing half kilo block of cheese and vegetable with a small diameter. 2. Use the Professional peeler for shredding cabbage, slicing vegetable of a bigger diameter, and one-kilo block of cheese. 3. Use the Julienne for making standard size julienne for solid fruits or vegetables such as carrot. 4. Smooth and effortless peeling. 5. Handle is comfortable even during repetitive action peeling. Package including: 3 x Magic Trio Peeler 1 x Orange peeler
